spec.rawSql:
SELECT
    toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time,
    edificio,
    sum(bytes) AS bytes
FROM telemetria.trafico_red
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND edificio IN (${edificio:singlequote})
GROUP BY time, edificio
ORDER BY time

SELECT
    ip_destino,
    aplicacion,
    count() AS conexiones,
    sum(bytes) AS trafico_total
FROM telemetria.trafico_red
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY ip_destino, aplicacion
ORDER BY trafico_total DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
    round(
        countIf(estado_actual = 'UP') * 100.0 / count(),
        2
    ) AS disponibilidad
FROM
(
    SELECT
        hostname,
        argMax(estado, timestamp) AS estado_actual
    FROM telemetria.trafico_red
    WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    GROUP BY hostname
)

SELECT count()
FROM telemetria.trafico_red
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND severidad = 'critica'

SELECT
    edificio,
    piso,
    hostname,
    ip_dispositivo,
    fabricante,
    tipo_dispositivo,
    estado,
    max(timestamp) AS ultima_lectura,
    sum(bytes) AS trafico_total,
    avg(latencia_ms) AS latencia_promedio,
    avg(perdida_pct) AS perdida_promedio
FROM telemetria.trafico_red
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY
    edificio,
    piso,
    hostname,
    ip_dispositivo,
    fabricante,
    tipo_dispositivo,
    estado
ORDER BY edificio, piso, trafico_total DESC

SELECT
    hostname,
    ip_dispositivo,
    edificio,
    fabricante,
    sum(bytes) AS trafico_total
FROM telemetria.trafico_red
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY hostname, ip_dispositivo, edificio, fabricante
ORDER BY trafico_total DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
    estado,
    count() AS total
FROM telemetria.trafico_red
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY estado
ORDER BY total DESC

SELECT
    fabricante,
    sum(errores) AS errores_totales
FROM telemetria.trafico_red
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY fabricante
ORDER BY errores_totales DESC

SELECT
    timestamp,
    edificio,
    piso,
    hostname,
    ip_dispositivo,
    fabricante,
    aplicacion,
    estado,
    severidad,
    descripcion_evento
FROM telemetria.trafico_red
WHERE estado != 'UP'
ORDER BY timestamp DESC 
LIMIT 50

SELECT
    aplicacion,
    sum(bytes) AS trafico_total
FROM telemetria.trafico_red
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY aplicacion
ORDER BY trafico_total DESC

SELECT
    edificio,
    avg(latencia_ms) AS latencia_promedio_ms
FROM telemetria.trafico_red
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND edificio IN (${edificio:singlequote})
GROUP BY edificio
ORDER BY latencia_promedio_ms DESC

spec.title: Pérdida promedio de paquetes por fabricante

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
    fabricante,
    avg(perdida_pct) AS perdida_promedio_pct
FROM telemetria.trafico_red
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY fabricante
ORDER BY perdida_promedio_pct DESC

SELECT
    timestamp,
    edificio,
    piso,
    hostname,
    ip_dispositivo,
    fabricante,
    estado,
    severidad,
    latencia_ms,
    perdida_pct,
    errores,
    descripcion_evento
FROM telemetria.trafico_red
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND severidad IN ('alta', 'critica')
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 100

spec.title: Observabilidad de Red Heterogénea - FCA UASLP

spec.name: edificio

spec.__legacyStringValue:
SELECT DISTINCT edificio
FROM telemetria.trafico_red
ORDER BY edificio

spec.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT edificio
FROM telemetria.trafico_red
ORDER BY edificio
